label: Session Ended
description: Fires when a conversation session ends. Use for batch analysis of complete conversations.

label: User Message Received
description: Fires on each incoming user message. Use for real-time analysis and detection.

payload.description: Message payload with role, content, messageId, messageIndex

payload.content: Hello, I can't log in to my account.

label: Agent Message Sent
description: Fires on each outgoing agent message. Use for response quality checks and guardrails.

payload.description: Message payload with role, content, messageId, messageIndex

payload.content: I'd be happy to help you recover your account. Can you share the email address?

label: Manual Trigger
description: Trigger the pipeline on demand via the API or Studio UI. The caller may supply a sessionId so session-scoped nodes (read-conversation, db-query) can operate against a specific conversation.

sessionId.description: Optional. Required by session-scoped nodes (read-conversation, db-query). Supplied by the Studio test drawer when running a pipeline that contains such nodes.

label: Scheduled
description: Run the pipeline on a recurring schedule using a cron expression.
